employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and modernize the framework stack.
employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, which is required for modern Java 17+ applications.

employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to ensure the compiler targets the correct JDK version.
employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build would target Java 11, potentially missing Java 17 features or failing if the environment enforces Java 17 compilation.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.annotation in Jakarta EE 9+; without this change, the import fails to resolve, causing a compilation error.

employee-service/src/main/resources/orm..general_idea: Update JPA ORM XML namespace and version to Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
employee-service/src/main/resources/orm..why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; the old EclipseLink namespace and JPA 2.4 version are incompatible with the Jakarta persistence API, causing runtime initialization failures or class loading errors.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import for the @Test annotation.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if the project enforces JUnit 5.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Hibernate Core groupId to reflect the modularization in Hibernate 6.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact org.hibernate:hibernate-core was moved to org.hibernate.orm:hibernate-core in Hibernate 6; using the old groupId results in a dependency resolution failure or missing classes if the version is upgraded to 6.x.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the Java EE javax package to the Jakarta EE jakarta package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK and is not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile error.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import for the @Test annotation.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner annotation and its associated import.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: org.junit.runner.RunWith and org.springframework.test.context.junit4.SpringRunner are JUnit 4 artifacts; they cause compile errors if the JUnit 4 engine is not present or if the test is intended to run on JUnit 5 platform.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test and org.junit.runner.RunWith are no longer supported or recognized by the test runner, causing tests to be skipped or fail to compile if dependencies are removed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using an older parent version would result in dependency conflicts and incompatibility with Spring Framework 6.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and its dependencies require Java 17; compiling with Java 8 settings would fail due to missing language features and API incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for compatibility with modern JDBC drivers and Spring Boot 3.
